name: ch34-opener-frontier-telescope
prompt: Simple, cartoon-like educational illustration with clean lines and a warm color palette: A friendly robot scientist standing on a mountain peak, looking through a giant telescope at a starry sky. Each star is a different shape representing a frontier research topic (a brain shape, a DNA helix, a circuit board, a crystal lattice, an eye). The robot has a notebook and is sketching what it sees. The mountain represents the current state of knowledge, and the stars represent emerging frontiers. A winding path behind the robot shows how far AI research has already climbed. The style should be friendly and approachable, like a comic strip or an XKCD-inspired infographic, with expressive characters and minimal visual clutter. Suitable for a technical textbook. No text or lettering in the image.

name: ch34-emergence-mirage
prompt: Simple, cartoon-like educational illustration with clean lines and a warm color palette: A desert scene where a robot walks toward what appears to be an oasis (representing emergent abilities). As the robot gets closer, the scene splits into two panels. In one panel, the oasis is real: a sudden lush garden appears at a specific scale threshold. In the other panel, the oasis is a mirage that gradually resolves into a smooth gradient of improvement when viewed with better measurement tools (represented by the robot putting on special glasses). The split view illustrates the debate over whether emergent abilities are real discontinuities or measurement artifacts. The style should be friendly and approachable, like a comic strip or an XKCD-inspired infographic, with expressive characters and minimal visual clutter. Suitable for a technical textbook. No text or lettering in the image.

name: ch34-alternative-architectures-zoo
prompt: Simple, cartoon-like educational illustration with clean lines and a warm color palette: A zoo or menagerie where each enclosure contains a different cartoon creature representing an alternative architecture. A transformer is shown as a majestic eagle with attention span wings. A state space model (Mamba) is a sleek snake that can process infinitely long sequences. A mixture-of-experts model is a hydra with multiple specialized heads. A retrieval-augmented model is an elephant with a library on its back. A visitor robot walks through the zoo, comparing the creatures. The style should be friendly and approachable, like a comic strip or an XKCD-inspired infographic, with expressive characters and minimal visual clutter. Suitable for a technical textbook. No text or lettering in the image.

name: ch34-system1-system2-thinking
prompt: Simple, cartoon-like educational illustration with clean lines and a warm color palette: Two panels showing the same robot facing a problem. In the left panel (System 1), the robot instantly blurts out an answer with a lightning bolt above its head, looking confident but the answer bubble contains a wrong result. In the right panel (System 2), the robot sits at a desk with a scratch pad, carefully working through steps, with a thought cloud showing branching paths and intermediate calculations. The answer bubble contains the correct result but a clock shows more time has passed. The contrast illustrates fast intuitive versus slow deliberate reasoning in LLMs. The style should be friendly and approachable, like a comic strip or an XKCD-inspired infographic, with expressive characters and minimal visual clutter. Suitable for a technical textbook. No text or lettering in the image.

name: ch34-world-model-snowglobe
prompt: Simple, cartoon-like educational illustration with clean lines and a warm color palette: A robot holding a snow globe, but inside the globe is a miniature simulated world with tiny buildings, cars, and weather patterns. The robot shakes the globe and watches how the miniature world responds, predicting what will happen next. Outside the globe is the real world, and the robot compares its simulation predictions against reality. Some predictions match (green check), others do not (red X). The scene illustrates world models where AI builds internal simulations to predict and reason about the physical world. The style should be friendly and approachable, like a comic strip or an XKCD-inspired infographic, with expressive characters and minimal visual clutter. Suitable for a technical textbook. No text or lettering in the image.

name: ch34-memory-filing-cabinet
prompt: Simple, cartoon-like educational illustration with clean lines and a warm color palette: A robot brain shown in cross-section with different memory compartments. The front area is a small bright workspace (working memory or context window) where the robot actively juggles a few items. Behind it is a medium-sized filing cabinet (episodic memory) with labeled folders from past conversations. In the back is a vast library (long-term parametric memory) representing trained knowledge. A conveyor belt moves items between compartments. The robot is trying to fit too many items into the small workspace, with some falling off, illustrating context window limitations. The style should be friendly and approachable, like a comic strip or an XKCD-inspired infographic, with expressive characters and minimal visual clutter. Suitable for a technical textbook. No text or lettering in the image.
